description: Balanced infrastructure resilience across monitoring maintenance security digital twins redundancy climate adaptation governance equity ecology fragility and burden.
Prioritizes sensing telemetry early warning situational awareness and monitoring coverage.
Prioritizes predictive maintenance asset renewal inspection prioritization and backlog reduction.
Prioritizes OT security segmentation incident response recovery safe defaults and cyber-physical resilience.
Prioritizes digital twins scenario testing simulation stress analysis and investment comparison.
Prioritizes climate exposure adaptation heat flood wildfire drought ecological buffers and critical-service continuity.
Prioritizes environmental justice accessibility vulnerable communities repair equity and anti-displacement.
Prioritizes procurement governance public accountability vendor controls data rights and corrective action.
Penalizes implementation burden when public capacity procurement staffing trust or technical complexity is constrained.
